name: Battle for Zendikar

draft.notes: If a foil appears it displaces a common (this includes expeditions).

statedRates: 25 Zendikar Expeditions; official rarity 'a little more frequent than a premium foil mythic rare'.
sourceNotes: Large set with five variations of each standard basic land plus 25 Zendikar Expeditions (Battle Lands / premium lands). Expeditions appear in the foil slot, displacing a common. US printing sequential collation with C1/C2 common collation. 36 packs per box.
